历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were 5908→5728→5619→7625→8621 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, it was basically stable in the 5600–5900 range. In 2024, the first new Gaokao (Physics Category) in Jilin Province saw a sharp rise to 7625 (+2006), and in 2025 it further shifted to 8621 (+996), with a cumulative shift of about 3000 places over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 8621. The university's enrollment plan in Jilin for Physics Category: 53 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 57 in 2024, 56 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 57, a slight increase of 1 compared to 2025, with a very small expansion rate (about 1.8%), having limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Agricultural University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 30th in 2021 → 27th in 2024 → 25th in 2025 → 24th in 2026, reflecting the continuous enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength. The 2024 reputation document showed that the university was rated as 'significantly negative' due to poor enrollment communication and unreasonable major settings, causing a sharp drop of about 500 places in the admission line. The 2025–2026 reputation documents no longer include negative signals for the university, and public opinion has stabilized. Douyin popularity ranks 13th overall (high heat), with prominent discussion on cafeteria topics; Zhang Xuefeng has recommended it multiple times, leading to high overall application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 7 disciplines rated A- or above: Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grassland Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A. The agricultural and forestry disciplines are top-tier nationally, exerting strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of ordinary Gaokao examinees in Jilin Province is 110,868. Estimated at about 72% for Physics Category, that is approximately 79,825, slightly lower than the 80,421 Physics Category examinees in 2025, indicating a small reduction in candidate scale. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Jilin Province candidates. The university's enrollment in Jilin for Physics Category is relatively small (about 57 people), so local preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the consecutive significant backward shifts in historical rankings over the past two years (the low-score majors at Yantai Research Institute dragged down the school line after the new Gaokao reform), the 2026 enrollment plan only slightly increases by 1, the university's ranking continues to rise, reputation and public opinion have stabilized, and the total number of examinees has slightly decreased, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will continue to shift backward slightly but with a significantly narrowed range. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8763, with a range of 8263–9263.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8263–9263, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates ranked within 8300 can aim for popular majors like experimental classes and Computer Class; those ranked between 8600–9200 are advised to prioritize advantageous disciplines such as Veterinary Medicine Class, Food Science and Engineering Class, and Agronomy; candidates ranked near 9263 should consider Tier 3 majors and Yantai Research Institute majors first to ensure admission.
